title: Performance degradation when using indexes in 1.2.2
description:
### What happens?

1. After switching from 1.1.3 to 1.2.2 I see performance degradation when using indexes.
2. Slow query performance when I use composite index (both 1.1.3 and 1.2.2)

### To Reproduce

Use sample parquet file (1.2GB)
```
wget https://spiceai-public-datasets.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/debugging/test_data.parquet
```

Run the following script `./test.sh`

```bash
duckdb --version

if [ -f test_table.db ]; then
    rm test_table.db
fi

duckdb test_table.db <<EOF
.mode trash
CREATE TABLE test_table AS SELECT * FROM read_parquet('test_data.parquet');
.timer on
SELECT Field3 FROM test_table WHERE Field1 = 'F1931ea3af-73c8-4ad3-990e-0f2add780352' AND Field2='F2429cc655-8c98-489b-b826-d97787bea6c0';
.timer off

-- Create composite index
CREATE INDEX idx_test_table_field1_field2 ON test_table(Field1, Field2);
EOF


sleep 1

# Test composite index
duckdb test_table.db <<EOF
.mode trash
-- Re-run query after composite index
.timer on
SELECT Field3 FROM test_table WHERE Field1 = 'F1931ea3af-73c8-4ad3-990e-0f2add780352' AND Field2='F2429cc655-8c98-489b-b826-d97787bea6c0';
.timer off

-- Recreate table and build individual indexes
DROP TABLE test_table;
CREATE TABLE test_table AS SELECT * FROM read_parquet('test_data.parquet');
CREATE INDEX idx_test_table_field1 ON test_table(Field1);
CREATE INDEX idx_test_table_field2 ON test_table(Field2);
EOF

sleep 1

# Test individual indexes
duckdb test_table.db <<EOF
.mode trash
.timer on
SELECT Field3 FROM test_table WHERE Field1 = 'F1931ea3af-73c8-4ad3-990e-0f2add780352' AND Field2='F2429cc655-8c98-489b-b826-d97787bea6c0';
EOF
```

Tested with DuckDB 1.1.3 and 1.2.2 with the following results. Reported times are: 
1 - original query time w/o indexes
2- query time using composite index
3- query time using individual indexes (0.003 with v1.1.3 vs 0.051 with v1.2.2 )

```
v1.1.3 19864453f7
Run Time (s): real 0.034 user 0.411996 sys 0.002084
100% ▕████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████▏ 
Run Time (s): real 0.078 user 0.412552 sys 0.082625
100% ▕████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████▏ 
100% ▕████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████▏ 
100% ▕████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████▏ 
Run Time (s): real 0.003 user 0.000983 sys 0.000628
```

```
v1.2.2 7c039464e4
100% ▕████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████▏ 
Run Time (s): real 0.039 user 0.441916 sys 0.002560
100% ▕████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████▏ 
Run Time (s): real 0.080 user 0.424460 sys 0.086260
100% ▕████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████▏ 
100% ▕████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████▏ 
100% ▕████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████▏ 
Run Time (s): real 0.051 user 0.478290 sys 0.082547
```

### OS:

macos aarch64

### DuckDB Version:

1.2.2

### DuckDB Client:

CLI

### Hardware:

Apple M3 Max, 36 GB

### Full Name:

Sergei Grebnov

### Affiliation:

INSERT INTO test_table_v2 VALUES ('F1931ea3af-73c8-4ad3-990e-0f2add780352', 'F2429cc655-8c98-489b-b826-d97787bea6c0', 'Sample Data', 42, 3.14, DATE '2023-01-01');
CREATE INDEX idx_test_table_v2_field1_field2 ON test_table_v2(Field1, Field2);
SELECT Field3 FROM test_table_v2 WHERE Field1 = 'F1931ea3af-73c8-4ad3-990e-0f2add780352' AND Field2 IS NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table_v2 WHERE Field4 > 40 AND Field5 < 5.0;
key_bug_features: Performance degradation when using composite indexes in DuckDB
